title: 9 to 5
why_this_song: 9 to 5 by Dolly Parton (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Barely gettin' by, it's all takin' and no givin'"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And yawn and stretch and try to come to life"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And they never give you credit"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Workin' 9 to 5, what a way to make a livin'"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Barely gettin' by, it's all takin' and no givin'"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And they never give you credit
It's enough to drive you crazy if you let it
They got you where they want you
And you think about it, don't you?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "life" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "life" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Pour myself a cup of ambition
Waitin' for the day your ship'll come in

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Out on the street, the traffic starts jumpin'

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "9 to 5" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "9 to 5" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "9 to 5" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "9 to 5"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Dolly Parton one question about "9 to 5", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Dolly Parton sobre "9 to 5", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
